description: S13-00 Business Process Repository registry — L1 intent->process_ref resolution target (ADR-048 D3 / ADR-049 D2). process_ref = {process_id, version}.

processes.name: BaaS Tenant Onboarding
processes.summary: White-label tenant setup
triggers: Tenant signs the BaaS partner agreement

processes.name: BaaS Settlement
processes.summary: Daily tenant settlement
triggers: Scheduled — daily settlement window per tenant agreement

processes.name: BaaS SLA Monitoring
processes.summary: Tenant SLA tracking
triggers: Continuous — real-time metric ingestion; threshold-breach alerts

processes.name: Card Activation
processes.summary: Customer activates card via app or IVR
triggers: Customer initiates activation via app or IVR

processes.name: Card Blocking
processes.summary: Fraud or customer-initiated block
triggers: Customer reports the card lost/stolen or requests a freeze

processes.name: Card Issuance
processes.summary: Virtual/physical card creation via Hyperswitch Card Vault
triggers: An approved customer requests a card

processes.name: Card Replacement
processes.summary: Lost/stolen replacement flow
triggers: Card reported lost/stolen, damaged, or expiring

processes.name: Consumer Duty DISP
processes.summary: FCA DISP complaints handling under Consumer Duty (PS22/9)

processes.name: Daily Reconciliation
processes.summary: CASS 7.15.17R — daily internal (Midaz) vs external (CAMT.053) reconciliation

processes.name: FIN060 Return
processes.summary: FCA regulatory return FIN060 — safeguarding funds report

processes.name: Fraud Detection
processes.summary: Real-time fraud scoring via Jube ML engine

processes.name: FX Exchange
processes.summary: Client-facing currency exchange / FX conversion: quote -> confirm -> convert -> settle
triggers: Customer requests an FX quote or currency conversion

processes.name: Regulatory Horizon Scanning
processes.summary: FCA/PRA/EBA regulatory change monitoring

processes.name: Notification Dispatch
processes.summary: Client-facing notification: build from template -> apply PII overlay -> dispatch -> log delivery

processes.name: OKR Planning
processes.summary: Quarterly OKR cycle

processes.name: Customer Onboarding
processes.summary: EMR 2011 Reg.4 — customer creation + KYC + agreement lifecycle

processes.name: Operational Risk Monitoring
processes.summary: Daily monitoring of key risk indicators

processes.name: Payment Processing
processes.summary: FPS/SEPA payment lifecycle: initiate → screen → authorise → settle → notify
triggers: Customer initiates a payment or transfer

processes.name: Referral Management
processes.summary: Client-facing referral: capture referral -> validate eligibility -> track conversion -> apply incentive

processes.name: Risk Assessment
processes.summary: Customer risk scoring at onboarding

processes.name: Product Roadmap Review
processes.summary: Monthly product review

processes.name: Sanctions Screening
processes.summary: OFAC/UN/EU/UK sanctions and PEP check

processes.name: SAR Filing
processes.summary: POCA 2002 s.330 — Suspicious Activity Report lifecycle: file → MLRO approve → submit NCA

processes.name: Spending Analytics
processes.summary: Client-facing spending breakdown / insights: aggregate by category -> compute insights -> render (PII-masked) -> surface
triggers: Customer requests a spending breakdown or insights

processes.name: Statement Generation
processes.summary: Client-facing account statement: validate period -> compile transactions -> render (PII-masked) -> deliver
triggers: Customer requests a statement for a period

processes.name: Transaction Monitoring
processes.summary: Real-time transaction screening via Jube probabilistic ML engine

processes.name: Wallet Balance Inquiry
processes.summary: Client-facing balance read: authenticate -> fetch balance -> return masked balance
